open_questions: When does decomposition help versus hurt prompt performance?
How does decomposition interact with chain-of-thought reasoning?
What is the right granularity for sub-task decomposition?
How does decomposition map to agent handoff patterns?
research_notes: Chain-of-thought prompting is a form of reasoning decomposition (Wei et al., 2022)
Least-to-most prompting decomposes complex problems into progressive sub-problems
In agent architectures, decomposition maps directly to task delegation
Over-decomposition can fragment context and lose coherence
Decomposition is most beneficial for tasks requiring multi-step reasoning
